perFrameCode: dt = if(irun,time-sb_stime, dt); //due to a phase shift of the sin wave, due to an initial phase shift of -PI/2, we add 2PI to make sure we start with rising values of the sin wave. This happens only once at the beginning of the detection process.
di = (bc-dc)*0.02; //difference in amount of rises and falls - higher value means more beats detected
dif = dif+dif*0.01*di; //add a little bit of difference to bass values so that they don't get stuck at local maxima
perFrameInitCode: sb_brate = 1; sb_rate = 1; sb_stime = time; sb_res = 0; res = 0;
